features.description: availableModels restrictions now apply to subagent overrides, agent dispatch picker, and advisor model
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `availableModels` restrictions not being applied to subagent model overrides, the agent dispatch model picker, and the advisor model

features.description: WebFetch wildcard domain rules and mid-pattern file permission wildcards now match correctly
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `WebFetch(domain:*.example.com)` wildcard domain rules never matching subdomains in allow, deny, and ask position, and file permission rules with mid-pattern wildcards (e.g. `Read(secrets-*/config.json)`) being rejected at startup

features.description: Background agents no longer read another directory's project settings (.mcp.json approvals, trust) on pre-warmed workers
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed background agents potentially reading another directory's project settings (`.mcp.json` approvals, trust) when dispatched onto a pre-warmed worker

features.description: Added a search bar when browsing a marketplace's plugins in /plugin
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a search bar when browsing a marketplace's plugins in `/plugin`

features.description: Sub-agents can now spawn their own sub-agents up to 5 levels deep
features.reference_changelog_line: Sub-agents can now spawn their own sub-agents (up to 5 levels deep)

features.description: Added model attribute to the claude_code.lines_of_code.count OTEL metric
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `model` attribute to the `claude_code.lines_of_code.count` OTEL metric

features.description: Amazon Bedrock reads AWS region from ~/.aws config; /status shows source
features.reference_changelog_line: Amazon Bedrock now reads the AWS region from `~/.aws` config files when `AWS_REGION` isn't set, matching AWS SDK precedence; `/status` shows where the region came from
